hero.title: The Seaside Holiday of Your Dreams
hero.subtitle: A luxury hotel in Novkhani, a magnificent Aqua Park, and an unforgettable family vacation all in one place.

aquaItems.title: Extreme Slides
aquaItems.desc: Adrenaline-filled high water slides and fast descents for adults.

aquaItems.title: Kids Water World
aquaItems.desc: Renovated safe kids' pools, mini-slides, and fun water fountains.

aquaItems.title: Family Pool
aquaItems.desc: A large swimming pool with a sea view and a peaceful relaxation area.

diningItems.title: Caspian Restaurant
diningItems.desc: The finest Azerbaijani and European cuisine paired with stunning sea views.

diningItems.title: Aqua Bar & Lounge
diningItems.desc: Refreshing cocktails, cold drinks, and snacks right by the poolside.

footer.desc: Premium family resort and Aqua Park right on the seashore in Novkhani.
